live_backtest_parity_alignment.note: This pass means the portfolio arbitration layer no longer depends on post-trade KALCB/OLR outcomes for live admission or sizing. It is not a substitute for a full source-engine replay or paper/live OMS parity audit.

source_strategy_contracts.olr: 14:30 decision, resting close auction, source round 5 artifact

phase_summaries.focus: Latest KALCB/OLR artifact baseline and accounting integrity
Neutral capacity and low-friction portfolio caps
Selective blockers that should block weaker trades first
Causal cross-strategy confirmation and sizing overlays
Robustness, ablation, and final promotion audit

promotion_blockers: full KALCB/OLR source replay is not rerun inside this portfolio optimisation layer
locked holdout was deliberately excluded from optimisation
paper/live OMS parity for the portfolio arbitration stream is still required before production promotion
